pizzas.name: Date Special Pizza
pizzas.description: House special pizza loaded with premium toppings, signature sauce, and baked to perfection with a golden crust.

pizzas.name: Crown Crust Pizza
pizzas.description: Cheese-filled crown crust with rich toppings and savory sauce, a decadent cheesy bite at every edge.
pizzas.short_description: Cheesy crown crust with rich toppings.

pizzas.description: Smoky Behari kebab chunks layered with mozzarella and signature sauce, delivering a robust flavor for meat lovers.

pizzas.description: Classic pizza with stuffed cheesy crust and rich toppings for the ultimate cheesy experience.

pizzas.description: Spicy tikka chicken with capsicum, onions, and mozzarella, baked to perfection with our signature sauce.

pizzas.description: Fajita-seasoned chicken with bold flavor, topped with cheese and fresh vegetables, baked for a flavorful bite.

pizzas.name: Loaded Chicken Pizza
pizzas.description: Fully loaded chicken pizza with rich cheese blend, fresh veggies, and savory sauce, perfect for cheese lovers.

pizzas.name: Hot and Spicy Pizza
pizzas.description: Fiery chicken pizza with extra spice, fresh toppings, and mozzarella, perfect for those who love a kick.

pizzas.name: Cheese Lover Pizza
pizzas.description: Loaded with rich mozzarella and cheese sauce, this pizza is a heaven for cheese lovers.

pizzas.name: Vegetarian Pizza
pizzas.description: Fresh vegetables layered over savory sauce and mozzarella, creating a healthy yet delicious pizza option.

burgers.name: Shami Kebab Burger
burgers.description: Soft shami kebab in a freshly baked bun with light sauce.
